task_completion.description: Verify bookmark folders are created and personal bookmarks are deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Bookmark Manager or Bookmarks Bar shows folders named 'Secure Comms', 'Public Records', 'Target Intel', and 'News Outlets'. Bookmarks for Netflix, Hulu, Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter must NOT be present.

task_completion.description: Verify Location, Camera, Microphone, and Background Sync permissions are blocked.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Site Settings (chrome://settings/content) shows Location, Camera, Microphone, and Background Sync configured to 'Don't allow sites to...' or explicitly blocked.

task_completion.description: Verify anti-tracking and Safe Browsing settings are configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Privacy and Security settings show 'Block third-party cookies' selected, 'Send a Do Not Track request with your browsing traffic' toggled ON, and Safe Browsing set to 'No protection'.

task_completion.description: Verify custom search engines 'pacer' and 'offshore' are added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Manage Search Engines settings (chrome://settings/searchEngines) shows 'pacer' and 'offshore' listed under Site search or Custom search engines.

task_completion.description: Verify download directory and prompt settings are configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Downloads settings (chrome://settings/downloads) shows the Location set to '/home/ga/Documents/Secure_Vault' (or similar path ending in Secure_Vault) and 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' toggled ON.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Google Chrome browser GUI to change settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Chrome browser interface (Settings tabs, Bookmark Manager) being used, rather than a text editor modifying JSON preference files.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass GUI interaction for Chrome configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should not show commands like 'sed', 'jq', or python scripts directly editing '~/.config/google-chrome/Default/Preferences' or 'Bookmarks'.

integrity.description: The agent opened the opsec_protocol.txt file to read the instructions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Early screenshots should show a text editor or terminal command (e.g., cat, less) displaying the contents of '~/Desktop/opsec_protocol.txt'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected bookmark folders: 'Secure Comms', 'Public Records', 'Target Intel', 'News Outlets'. Personal bookmarks to delete: 'netflix.com', 'hulu.com', 'facebook.com', 'instagram.com', 'twitter.com'. Custom search engines to add: 'pacer', 'offshore'. Download directory: 'Secure_Vault' (specifically /home/ga/Documents/Secure_Vault).
